---
id: verifies-a-two-factor-challenge
title: "Verifies a two-factor challenge"
description: "Exchanges a challenge_token issued by `/auth/login` plus a current TOTP (or a backup code) for a full session response with `api_key`."
sidebar_label: "Verifies a two-factor challenge"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Verifies a two-factor challenge"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/auth/otp_challenge"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Exchanges a challenge_token issued by `/auth/login` plus a current TOTP (or a backup code) for a full session response with `api_key`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
